## Description

<!-- Brief summary of what this PR adds or changes -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New topic note and/or practice questions
- [ ] `fix` — Correction to existing content (factual error, outdated info)
- [ ] `style` — Formatting/structure fix (no content change)
- [ ] `docs` — README, CONTRIBUTING, or other repo docs

## Notes Affected

<!-- List the files added or modified -->

- `content/...`
- `content/Practice Questions/...`

## Checklist

- [ ] Topic note follows [Vault Conventions](../VAULT_CONVENTIONS.md) (frontmatter, structure, footer)
- [ ] Practice questions file created/updated with correct format
- [ ] Note linked from `content/index.md`
- [ ] Cross-links added to/from related notes
- [ ] Built and verified locally with `npx quartz build --serve`
- [ ] Callouts collapse/expand correctly
- [ ] No broken wikilinks
